title: Email Activities Problems
excerpt: Ever since the boards were updates with the new look, I have been experiencing problems with email app. When I try to save templates, it creates weird spacing that isnt consistent accross my templates and on top of that …

posts.author: zkendall (Zack Kendall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ever since the boards were updates with the new look, I have been experiencing problems with email app. When I try to save templates, it creates weird spacing that isnt consistent accross my templates and on top of that a Dashed line now shows up on every email?

Also I used to be able to overwrite templates with new saves. But now that feature is gone again. Is that permanent?

Here’s a screenshot. Black box is just covering stuff i don’t want seen.

Screen Shot 2022-06-28 at 10.20.15 AM2526×1606 233 KB
